AuthorizeSecurityGroupRule.securityGroupId: The security group ID for which a new security group rule is being authorized
AuthorizeSecurityGroupRule.sgVersion: Security group version number, used for optimistic locking control
AuthorizeSecurityGroupRule.rule: The security group rule to be authorized
AuthorizeSecurityGroupRule.rule.remark: Rule remark (used in: create security group, list security groups, authorize rule, revoke rule)
AuthorizeSecurityGroupRule.rule.direction: Rule direction, valid values: ingress/egress (used in: create security group, list security groups, authorize rule, revoke rule)
AuthorizeSecurityGroupRule.rule.ethertype: Ethernet protocol type (used in: create security group, list security groups, authorize rule, revoke rule)
AuthorizeSecurityGroupRule.rule.portRange: Port range, e.g. 1-65535; empty string means all ports (used in: create security group, list security groups, authorize rule, revoke rule)
AuthorizeSecurityGroupRule.rule.protocol: Protocol type, valid values: tcp/udp/icmp; empty string means all protocols (used in: create security group, list security groups, authorize rule, revoke rule)
AuthorizeSecurityGroupRule.rule.sourceGroupId: Source security group ID, valid only when direction is ingress (used in: create security group, list security groups, authorize rule, revoke rule)
AuthorizeSecurityGroupRule.rule.sourceIp: Source IP address (CIDR format), valid only when direction is ingress (used in: create security group, list security groups, authorize rule, revoke rule)
AuthorizeSecurityGroupRule.rule.destGroupId: Destination security group ID, valid only when direction is egress (used in: create security group, list security groups, authorize rule, revoke rule)
AuthorizeSecurityGroupRule.rule.destIp: Destination IP address (CIDR format), valid only when direction is egress (used in: create security group, list security groups, authorize rule, revoke rule)
AuthorizeSecurityGroupRule.rule.securityGroupId: ID of the security group to which the rule belongs (list security groups)
AuthorizeSecurityGroupRule.rule.securityGroupRuleId: Security group rule ID (list security groups)
AuthorizeSecurityGroupRule.rule.updatedTime: Rule last update time (list security groups)
